versions.version_description: Has a more detailed chord approach, highlighting different bass chords and chords for Intro/Outro.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: Can You Feel The Love Tonight

content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
All my life was a paper[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
once plain pure and white[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
'till you moved with your pen[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G7[/ch]
changing moods now and then[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
'till the balance was right.[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch] 
Then you added some music[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
every note was in place[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
and anybody could see[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G7[/ch]
all the changes in me[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
by the look on my face.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
decorated my life[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]
created a world[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
where dreams are apa-a-art.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
decorated my life[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
by painting your love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
all over my hea-a-art...[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
you decorated my life.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab]         [ch]G[/ch]
Like a rhyme with no reason[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
in an unfinished song[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bm7[/ch]
there was no harmony[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]G7[/ch]
life meant nothing to me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
until you came along.[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
And you brought out the colors[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]
what a gentle surprise[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm7[/ch]
now I’m able to see[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]G7[/ch]
all the things life can be[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]D7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
shinning soft in your eyes.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] 
decorated my life[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]B7[/ch]      [ch]G7[/ch]    [ch]Em7[/ch]
created a world[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]Am7[/ch] [ch]D7[/ch]
where dreams are apa-a-art.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
And you[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D7[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
decorated my life[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]B7[/ch]           [ch]G7[/ch]  [ch]Em7[/ch]
by painting your love[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]D7[/ch]
all over my hea-a-art...[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]Bm7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
you decorated my life.[/tab]
